mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO news_data_cron (crawler_id, title, content, publish_time, source, url, pic_url) VALUES
(#{item.crawlerId}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, #{item.publishTime}, #{item.source}, #{item.url}, #{item.picUrl})
mapper.delete: delete from news_data_cron where url = #{url} and crawler_id = #{crawlerId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news_data_cron where url = #{url} and crawler_id = #{crawlerId}
